Answer: A & D

So together, they work to elevate or depress parts of the head and neck structures.

That makes sense because if you imagine stretching your chin down, that's depression. But wait, isn't part of its role related to lifting? Because when both sides contract simultaneously, they pull the hyoid up and forward, causing the mandible to drop. Additionally, each individual belly may have specific roles; however, collectively, their main effect is depressing the mandible.
